description: CompositionBlue round neck, half sleeve t-shirt in 100% cotton, with chest print FittingComfortWash care Light machine wash Do not bleach Warm iron on reverse Do not dry clean Dry flat/reverse Do not scrub Moulin Rouge has been probably the most popular entertainment centre the world over. lee celebrates the popularity of this coveted centre that has brought smiles onto lakhs of faces for years on end, with this blue t-shirt.
